parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id,
  source_type,
  source_id,
  title,
  url,
  content_hash,
  last_checked,
  target_page,
  target_section,
  priority
FROM fafo_law_sources
WHERE active = true
ORDER BY priority DESC, id ASC;

=UPDATE fafo_law_sources
SET 
  content_hash = '{{ $json.newHash }}',
  last_checked = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.sourceDbId }};

=INSERT INTO fafo_law_changes (
  source_id,
  change_type,
  old_content_hash,
  new_content_hash,
  summary,
  severity,
  affected_pages,
  status
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.sourceDbId }},
  'content_modified',
  '{{ $json.oldHash }}',
  '{{ $json.newHash }}',
  'Law content has been modified. Awaiting analysis.',
  'unknown',
  '{"{{ $json.target_page }}": true}',
  'pending'
) RETURNING id;
